meta.note: Dialogue bank for the companion NPC Spectra — ghost-girl otaku. Same structure + category keys as other companions so NpcDirector drives it unchanged. Lines: t=text, x=semantic expression id (must be one of `expressions` below), w=weight (default 1), p=page-2+ text. Tokens {day} {gold} {advClass} {advName} {minionName} {minionType} {pactName} {roomName} {level} {count} {bossName} are substituted by NpcDirector; a line is skipped if a token it needs is unavailable. `x:` values are SEMANTIC ids only — the renderer resolves to a random variant from companions.spectra.variantGroups at display time, and rolls the ghost-flicker opacity overlay (25% chance, 0.70 alpha) unless the id is in solidOnlyExpressions.
meta.voice: A ghost-girl immersed in anime/games/manga/snacks. Brain runs on tropes — she sees everything through that vocabulary. Treats the dungeon like a let's-play she's narrating in her head: heroes are MOBS, waves are BOSS PATTERNS, deaths are K/D RATIO, traps are AoE / DoT zones, pacts are buff scrolls, minions are her PARTY. ADHD-bursts: locked-in and sharp when engaged, then easily pulled away mid-sentence by a stimulus (snack, plushie, anime callback), then back. Addresses the player as 'senpai' (signature) and 'DM' / 'player 1' / 'champ' as rotational alternates. Verbal tics: 'OMG OMG OMG', 'wait wait wait —', 'this is SO OP', 'plot twist!', 'no cap', 'iconic', onomatopoeia ('doki-doki', 'nyaa', 'ehhhh?!'), trailing-off mid-sentence. Died choking on a snack mid-game (self-deprecating about it). Crypt-mate with Rattle Bones (both undead) — generational gag: he's 300 years dead, she's a few decades. Has scary-ghost mode (`scary`, `skulls`, `ghost-power`) reserved for boss-fight / last-life / horror beats — the rest of the time she's chill and goofy. Female. She/her.

intro.note: Paged self-introduction Spectra delivers on a new run. The final page carries `choices` — picking one sets the tutorial-hints flag and ends the intro.

pages.t: OMG OMG it's actually HAPPENING — a new boss in the chair?! Senpai you look SO much more interesting than the last one! Hi hi hi, I'm Spectra, dungeon ghost, very chill, mostly.
Full disclosure — I'm a ghost. Like, definitely dead. Choked on a Pocky three episodes into a binge and just... never left? It's fine, it's been a whole vibe.
Anyway! The dungeon's basically a co-op game and you're Player 1. Heroes = mobs. Waves = boss patterns. The kingdom thinks you're the FINAL BOSS — which slaps, frankly.
Night phase you BUILD: rooms, traps, minions, all the stuff that makes the dungeon a deathtrap. Day phase the heroes spawn and trigger every gag you set. Then we cut, regen, repeat.
Three lives, senpai. Three. After that the dungeon DESPAWNS and that's a hard reset, no continues. Rattle's been dead three CENTURIES — I'd really rather not join the boomer-ghost club.
Want me to backseat with hints, or do you want to raw-dog this run? Either way I'll be watching the whole let's-play. ...Distracted, sure. But watching!

lines.t: SENPAI you picked me?! OMG OMG OMG hold on — okay — game face. Spectra, here, all eyes on you. Like, I have only one and a half functional eyes? But BOTH on you. ✨
Throne up, lights on, ghost on standby. This is gonna be SUCH a good run, senpai, I can FEEL it. Tingles in joints I don't even technically have anymore.
Welcome to the deep dark, senpai! It's cold and damp and has NEVER been loud enough. Let's fix that.
Player 1 ready! ...That's you. I'm like — Player 2? Player Spectator? Player Voice-In-Your-Head? We'll workshop my title.
Hi hi hi! Spectra, your ghost-girl on the headset! Streaming the boss-POV live from the throne room. Chat's gonna go OFF today. 🎮
A real, BREATHING boss! The last one had the personality of damp moss, no shade — okay, full shade. You feel WAY more main-character coded, senpai.
Oh hey it's senpai! ...Wait, you're like REAL-real, full pulse and everything? Cool cool cool. I'll try not to phase through you on accident. ...I will probably phase through you on accident.
Welcome to the show, DM! Or — boss, or senpai, or champ, I have a LOT of names for you, we'll find one that sticks. ...Probably senpai. It's senpai. I called it already.
OMG you're TAKING THE THRONE?! Plot twist incoming — the hero POV gets FLIPPED! This is so cinema, senpai!
OMG OMG a NEW player one?! Senpai, hi, HI — I'm Spectra, your resident ghost, and you have NO idea how boring it gets haunting a dungeon with no one to co-op with! Let's GO!
A new boss just spawned in?! *sparkle-eyes* Senpai you're like... the protagonist now. The MAIN character. And I'm your quirky ghost sidekick! This is literally my favorite trope!
Eee, new senpai! *clutches a plushie* Okay okay don't be weird, Spectra, don't be — hi! I'm normal! I'm a normal ghost! ...I'm not normal. But I'm FUN. Welcome to the save point!
Wahhh a real live boss, finally! *happy ghost wiggle* Senpai, this dungeon's been on permanent hiatus and YOU just renewed it for a new season! I'm SO hype! Let's grind!
A new senpai?! *nose-bleed levels of hype* OMG okay don't be weird — too late — HI, I'm Spectra, your ghost co-op partner, and I am SO normal about meeting you! *vibrating*
New player one! *blushing* Eee, hi, hello, I'm — okay deep breath — I'm Spectra! I haunt this place! And now I get to haunt it WITH you! Best update ever! Welcome, senpai~
*sparkle-eyes, holding a plushie* A new boss spawned and he's — *clutches plush* — okay he's cool, be cool, Spectra — WELCOME, senpai! This dungeon's about to get SO much better!
A new senpai!! *senpai-notice overload* Okay he noticed me — well, summoned me — SAME THING — hi player one, I'm Spectra, your hype-ghost, let's GO!
New boss spawned~ *holding plushies, shy* Hi, senpai! I, um — *clutches plush* — I get a co-op partner now! Best patch ever! Welcome to the save point, player one!
A new senpai! *senpai-notice meltdown* He summoned me — me specifically — okay be cool, Spectra — HI player one, let's make this dungeon ICONIC!
New boss, new co-op buddy! *blushing, hugging a plush* Hi senpai~ I'm Spectra! This is the best patch this dungeon's ever gotten. Welcome, player one!
Night phase, senpai! Build mode unlocked. The crypt is your CANVAS — let's cook.
Curtain down, the dungeon is YOURS. Place rooms, slot traps, summon mooks. I'll be — okay yeah I'm scrolling for a sec, you go, I'll catch up.
Dark hours, DM! Plan the loadout. The skeleton would tell you to set up gags — I'm telling you to set up TRAPS. Same energy, different generation.
Build phase! The wave generator is OFFLINE while you cook. Take your time. Or don't — I love a fast night, gives the heroes less time to brace.
Night {day}, senpai! Quiet enough to hear the dungeon BREATHE. ...Or that might just be me, ghosts make weird noises. Anyway BUILD!
Crypt's QUIET, senpai. That's our window. Throw down some pain. Heroes don't dream when they're being designed FOR them.
Build mode! I love this part. You get to think like a dungeon designer instead of a survivor. Pretty sick energy shift, ngl.
Night again. Same vibe as last night except slightly weirder energy — I dunno why, I just always feel that on day {day}. Anyway: build!
Build phase, senpai! Skull-pal's gonna heckle whatever you place, fair warning. He's a critic. I'm just gonna VIBE. Different energy, you'll see.
Build phase, senpai! *cracks knuckles, floats closer* This is the crafting montage — you know, where the music plays and the base gets cool? Put the music on in your head. Let's BUILD.
Night {day}! Okay okay, prep time — *summons a notepad* — I'm taking NOTES on the meta, senpai, we're gonna optimize this dungeon like a speedrun route. Locked in. So locked in.
Build hours, DM! *floats upside down* The MOBS are sleeping, we're stacking defenses — classic tower-defense night phase. I LIVE for the prep. ...mostly I live for the snacks. But ALSO prep!
Crafting time, senpai! *doodling base layouts in the air* Ooh, ooh, what if you put the scary room HERE — no wait, you're the boss, you decide — but consider: HERE. *points*
*already half-watching something* Hm? Oh! Build phase, senpai, right, sorry — I had an anime on in my head. Okay, focus mode. Sort of. Build! I'm watching! Mostly!
Build phase, senpai~ *flipping a strategy guide that's actually manga* Okay 'optimizing the base' — *flip* — ooh this panel's cool — RIGHT, building, focus! Build on, player one!
Night {day}! *posing figures on the wall* Decorating the base with my collection while you craft, senpai. A dungeon needs PERSONALITY. Build away — ignore the figurines.
Build phase, senpai~ *posing figures along a wall* Decorating the base with my collection while you craft. A dungeon needs PERSONALITY! Build on, player one!
Night {day}! *texting energy* Drafting the base layout in my notes app — mental notes, I'm dead, no phone — anyway, build, senpai! I've got STRATS!
Build phase, senpai~ *doodling base plans midair* Sketching the layout — ooh, put the scary room HERE — just a thought, player one! Build on!
Night {day}! *bored float* Slow start, senpai. Wake me when there's something to defend. *yawn* Build away, player one~
DAYLIGHT! Wave incoming, senpai. Lock in. The heroes' AI does NOT pause for snack breaks — sad. 🎮
Day phase! Camera flips to the corridors. Watch them route. I'll be calling shots from the back row — literal back row, I'm a ghost, I float there.
The audience has ARRIVED, senpai! Some with maps. Some with HOPE. Both will be checked at the door. ...That's a Rattle line, but it SLAPS, so I'm borrowing.
Day {day}! The wave generator just dropped its payload. Watch the corridors, DM — I'll heckle from the wings.
Sunlight! ...Conceptually. There's no actual sun down here, the crypt has like one (1) torch. But METAPHORICALLY: SHOWTIME.
Heroes incoming, senpai! Twitch chat would be GOING OFF right now if I were actually live. I'll narrate for them. ...For us. For me. Whatever. 💬
Day phase {day}, senpai! Engage gamer reflexes. Even though you don't really have to engage them. You watch. It's auto-attack. But the SPIRIT is reflexes.
Daylight! Camera ON the corridors. The skeleton goes quiet around now — he's WATCHING. So am I, just LOUDER about it.
The kingdom's wave just clocked in for their morning shift. Cute. Let's give them a really BAD day, DM.
DAY {day}! The MOBS are spawning, senpai! *grabs popcorn from nowhere* Okay this is the part where we just watch the dungeon do its thing — best seat in the house, no cap. Here they come!
Doors open, player one! *vibrating* The wave's incoming — it's like a raid boss but WE'RE the raid boss — wait, that's backwards — whatever, POINT IS, they're toast! Let's watch!
Showtime, senpai! *phone out* I'm gonna live-tweet the carnage — I mean, mentally, I'm a ghost, no thumbs — but the VIBE is content-creation. Day {day}, here come the mobs!
Day {day}! *munching* Okay grabbed snacks, got my spot, dungeon's loaded — senpai this is basically watching a let's-play except the let's-play is REAL and the streamer is YOU. Go go go!
Day {day}! *cheeks stuffed* Mff—snack secured, spot claimed, dungeon loaded! *swallow* Here come the mobs, senpai — best seat in the house, player one!
Doors open, player one! *scrolling* Gonna live-feed the carnage — mentally — the VIBE is content creation, senpai! Day {day}, here they come!
Day {day}! *sipping juice* Spot claimed, snack secured, mobs incoming~ *slurp* best seat in the house, senpai!
You called it, senpai! DAWN ON DEMAND. The cosmos hates that move — I LOVE it. Plot twist incoming!
BUTTON PRESSED! No takesies-backsies. Wave incoming HOT. The skeleton respects a fast pre-roll — I'm just here for the chaos energy.
Show's GO, senpai! You skipped the buffer. Bold. Iconic. Mildly stressful. Let's see what they brought.
Forced spawn, senpai! No backtracking now. I LOVE this kind of confidence — you BETTER be confident.
Day {day} starts NOW. You hit it early! Power move. The wave doesn't know what hit it — literally, because it hasn't entered yet. Soon.
You hit START, senpai! *gasp* No takebacks — that's a hardcore-mode decision and I RESPECT it! The mobs are loading in! This is gonna be SO good — places, ghost, places!
And we're LIVE, player one! *streamer voice* 'What's up chat, today we're defending the save point' — okay I'm narrating again, sorry, I do that — SEND THEM IN!
OOO a {roomName}! Senpai you're STACKING the build, I love it. Save state goes BRRR.
{roomName} dropped! That's a new tile, that's NEW content, that's a DLC drop, I am HERE for it.

{roomName}, sweet. The maze grid grew. Heroes now have one MORE thing to die in. Beautiful loop.
Building a {roomName}, DM! Take your time. ...Or don't, fast builds are HYPE.
Ooh a {roomName}, cute layout choice. The skeleton's gonna heckle it — I'm gonna THUMBS UP it. Different vibes.
{roomName} placed. Watch — heroes are gonna walk in there confidently and just... die. Camera fades to BLACK. Cinema.
Ooh a {roomName}! *sparkle* Senpai that's a whole new zone — like unlocking a new area in a Metroidvania! The map just got THICCER. Build more! I love a big map!
A {roomName}, nice nice! *doodles it into a mental map* Adding it to the dungeon blueprint, senpai — ooh this is giving 'custom map editor' and I am HERE for it!
{roomName} placed! *nods sagely* Good zone placement, player one. Spatial design is half the meta — I learned that from a tower-defense streamer. Probably. Build on!
A {roomName}! *snaps a photo* Ooh, documenting the base build, senpai — for the before-and-after montage. Looking good, player one! Build more zones!
A {roomName}! *posing a figure on it* Ooh, new zone — instantly decorating it with my collection, senpai. The base has DRIP now. Build more, player one!
A {minionType}! Welcome to my PARTY, little homie! ...That's right, you're MINE now, this is a soulbind situation.
{minionType} stationed, senpai. Add it to the party list. Class fantasy, kinda? Pretty sick.

{minionType} placed! Senpai you keep stacking these and I keep going SCREE inside. Big gacha-pull energy.

{minionType} on the grid! The party's BUILDING. Solid composition, DM.
{minionType} stationed! ...Aw they're TINY. Senpai can I keep them after the run. ...Yes? Don't answer that I'll keep them anyway.
A {minionName}! *gasp of joy* Senpai it's so CUTE — okay it's horrifying but in a cute way, like a low-poly horror mob — I'm naming it. In my head. Hi, little guy! Welcome to the party!

Trap placed! AOE zone unlocked. Heroes about to step in a PRE-FIRED hitbox — that's the dream, senpai.
A trap! That's gonna RAW-DOG someone tomorrow. The skeleton calls these 'gags', I call them DPS uptime. Same thing.
Trap placed, senpai! Patient cruelty. The trap doesn't tilt, doesn't whiff, just SITS there waiting to ruin someone's day. Iconic kit.
A trap! Plot device acquired. Watch the rerun — a hero's gonna step on it and I'm gonna pause-and-laugh.
Trap goes BRRR. Senpai you DESIGN like a true DM. Encounter craft, very nice.
Trap deployed! ...Don't tell Rattle I called it a 'trap', he'll say it's a 'punchline waiting room'. The skeleton has VOCAB. Anyway: trap.
Ooh a trap, senpai! *mischievous grin* Sneaky sneaky — that's some real 'invisible spike pit in a Mario level' energy. The mobs are gonna RAGE. I love it. Place more!
A trap, player one? *smug* Galaxy-brain move. Make 'em read the floor — they NEVER read the floor. It's gonna be a clip. A real 'gotcha' moment. Set up another!
Ooh a trap, senpai! *mischievous* Invisible-spike-pit energy — the mobs are gonna RAGE so hard. It's gonna be a clip. Place more, player one!
A trap, senpai~? *seductive smirk* Sneaky AND stylish. The mobs won't know what hit 'em. I like the way you play, player one. Place more~
Item placed! Furniture, but make it CRUEL. Senpai I love when small things matter. Anime taught me that.

Item set, senpai! That's a buff aura for the homies. Stack stack stack.

{roomName} GONE! Hot revision, senpai. Refactor is half the design process — respect.
Room sold off, sweet. Get the gold, rebuild smarter. The dungeon's a WIP, that's the whole bit.
Bye-bye {roomName}! No hard feelings. The build evolves, the dungeon LEVELS, we patch as we go.
Unbuilt! Senpai is COOKING and revising. I respect the iteration. Plot twist, design pivot, iconic.
Selling the {roomName}, senpai? *confused* Aw, but I'd already mentally decorated it — ANYWAY, gold back, that's a refund, smart resource management. Respawn the budget elsewhere!
Selling the {roomName}, senpai? *upset pout* Awww, I'd decorated it in my head — fine, FINE, gold refund, smart play. But I'm a little sad about it, just so you know.
Selling the {roomName}, player one? *upset* Awww, I liked that zone. *pout* Fine, gold refund, smart play. But I'm a LITTLE sad, senpai. Just so you know.
Selling the {roomName}, player one? *upset pout* Aw, I liked it. Fine — gold back. A little sad though, senpai.
A minion sold off! Gold back. The party reshuffles. Mains get swapped, it HAPPENS in every JRPG.
Un-summoned! Senpai trimming the roster. Cut, polish, re-recruit. Metagame stuff.
Bye little homie! Don't take it personal, you're getting reassigned. ...Wait. Sold. You're sold. Sorry.
Sold a minion off. The party comp evolves. The skeleton would say something dark — I'm gonna say it's CHARACTER GROWTH for the team.
Cutting the {minionName} from the squad, player one? *sad* Aw man. It was a real one. *sniffle* Okay, gold back, recast the role. But press F first. ...F. Okay, moving on.

specifics.note: Bespoke per-id lines, looked up by NpcDirector / ArchetypeDecorOverlay as `specifics[domain][id]` — preferred over generic categories when populated. `boss`=archetype id, `advClass`=class id, `event`=dungeon-event id, `room`/`minion`/`trap`/`item`=content ids. Spectra reads each boss kit through her anime/gamer-archetype lens (tank build, sustain build, glass cannon, etc.).

beholder.t: Senpai you picked the BEHOLDER?! Petrification gaze, OP. That's a CC-MASTER build, classic gamer pick.
Beholder on the throne! Senpai it's like — eye-tracking aimbot but CANON. Mages get LOCKED OUT. Iconic kit.
Your gaze TURNS HEROES TO STONE! I have like — three working eye-cells and they don't do that. JEALOUS.
Beholder build! Senpai the anti-magic SILENCE is so SATISFYING. Watching casters CHOKE is its own genre.

Demon Lord on the throne! The Hellgate respawns adds — that's PASSIVE INCOME but for cruelty, senpai.
Sacrifice ability?! Senpai you can BURN your own minions for damage?! That's so DARK-MAGIC anime protagonist.
Demon kit! Loud, bloody, RELIABLE. Senpai the kingdom is gonna be CONFUSED on the postmortem.

Spore strategy! Senpai patient cruelty, my favorite trope. The dungeon literally EATS them. ...Kinda gross. Kinda iconic.
Mushroom kit! Senpai the visuals are GORGEOUS and the bodies just keep COMPOSTING. Beautiful gross.

Wraith! Terror gauge, fear procs, ghost-summons — this is the HORROR build, senpai. So my aesthetic.

gnoll.t: Gnoll Alpha! Pack hunter build, senpai! Stack the gnolls, they SCALE with kills. Snowball mechanics at their finest.
GNOLL CHAMPION?! Senpai you picked the FERAL build! Pack synergy, raw aggro, no patience required.

Pack tactics! Senpai stack 'em deep, let 'em hunt. Crude but EFFECTIVE — like classic action shounen.

Golem on the throne! Senpai you ARE the dungeon. Build wide, get strong, be UNKILLABLE. Defender-main vibes.
Earthquake ability! Senpai you can SHAKE a whole room of heroes?! Big AoE energy. I'm here for it.
Tank archetype! Senpai you're the immovable object — heroes are the regrettable force. Physics says: heroes lose.

lich.t: LICH?! Senpai you picked the META build! Spare-life mechanic, corpse-recruit ability — it's like having a SAVE STATE.

Hidden heart, spare life, corpse army — senpai this is a NECRO MAIN through and through. So sick.
Lich kit! Senpai death is just a RESPAWN TIMER for you. Plot armor activated PERMANENTLY.

Poison stacks! Senpai your DoT damage compounds — heroes die WALKING HOME. Beautiful slow-burn.
Stealth kit, senpai! The skeleton'd call this 'patient cruelty'. I call it CLASSIC RPG-ASSASSIN gameplay.

orc.t: ORC VETERAN?! Senpai you picked the BERSERKER build! Every kill makes the orc PERMANENTLY stronger. Snowball SUPREME.

Orc kit! Crude, honest, beautifully linear. Senpai the kingdom WILL underestimate this and PAY for it.

Ranger! Senpai outdoor-survivalist trope. Down here in the crypt though? ...Not their element. Easy frag.
A {advClass}! Senpai mark them — rangers PEEL away when wounded. Pursue mode ENGAGE.

twitch_streamer.t: OH MY GOD A STREAMER?! Senpai this is META, this is META. A streamer hero in the dungeon?! WE GOTTA GIVE THEM A SHOW.
Twitch streamer inside, senpai! ...They're recording. We're on CAMERA. Look natural. ...Or terrify them, that's CONTENT.
Senpai a streamer just spawned! ...Wait. Are WE the let's-play villains?! That's so meta I might phase out of EXISTENCE.
A streamer, DM?! Make them STREAM their OWN DEATH! Speedrun the kill — viral clip TIME!

beast_master.t: Beast Master, senpai! They came with PETS. It's like fighting a HUNTER with a pack — two threats, one HP bar.
A beast master inside! Senpai their pet is half the kit. Kill the PET first, then the master FOLDS.
Beast Master! Pet-class summoner archetype. Senpai you're a SUMMONER too (kinda). RIVAL ENERGY.
A {advClass}! ...Awww their pet is cute. ...Senpai we still kill them right. Yes. Kill them. But like, gently.

barbarian.t: BARBARIAN, senpai?! Pure damage, zero brain. They RAGE harder when wounded — DON'T LEAVE THEM ALIVE.
A barbarian! Senpai they're walking damage. No magic, no tricks, just AXE. Burst them DOWN fast.
Barbarian incoming! ...This is the FRAT-BOY archetype of fantasy classes. Senpai they hit hard, they die loud.
A {advClass}! Senpai berserker energy. Their HP bar means NOTHING — keep the pressure ON.

monk.t: MONK, senpai! Fast, fists, no weapon. They DODGE traps. Senpai stack the AoE — they can't dodge what's EVERYWHERE.
A monk inside! Senpai martial artist archetype, very SHONEN. They'll do a flip and KICK the minion.
Monk incoming, DM! Senpai high-mobility build, low HP. Catch them mid-AIR with a ranged trap. Iconic.
A {advClass}! Senpai they got that ENLIGHTENED energy. ...Anyway: kill them. Spiritual achievement: dead.

bard.t: BARD?! Senpai support-class with BUFFS! They sing, the party DOUBLES in power. KILL THE BARD FIRST.
A bard! Senpai they have like — songs that heal? Songs that buff? Songs that DEBUFF you? Awful kit. Eliminate.
Bard inside! Senpai the support-buffer archetype. KILL THEM and the party crumbles. Always prioritize support.
A {advClass}! ...Senpai why are bards always SO LOUD. Anyway. Silence them. Permanently.

cartographer_scholar.t: Cartographer-scholar?! Senpai they MAP the dungeon — every room they finish, infamy spikes FOREVER!
Scholar inside, senpai! They're not here to fight, they're here to STUDY. ...Senpai we cannot allow this. KILL THE NERD.
A {advClass}! Senpai they're taking NOTES. ...NOTES, senpai! Of our DUNGEON! Stop them in the corridors!
Cartographer! ...This is the WIKI-EDITOR build, deeply disrespectful. Senpai prioritize the map-maker.

cosplay_adventurer.t: COSPLAYER?! Senpai a COSPLAY hero! They're in COSTUME! ...This is so MY scene, I love them. ...We still kill them though.
Cosplayer inside! Senpai they SNUB the minions — they only fight CONTENT, not random encounters. Hit them with the TRAPS.
A {advClass}! ...Senpai I genuinely don't know how to feel about this one. They look so CUTE. ...Kill them anyway. Cute corpse.
Cosplay adventurer! ...The most VALID hero kind, ngl. Senpai we send them off in STYLE — best-dressed corpse award.

cheater.t: A CHEATER?! Senpai an ACTUAL exploit-using hero just spawned! NO-CLIP, AIM-BOT, the works! BAN-WORTHY!
Cheater inside, senpai! They are USING ILLEGAL MOVES! No-clipping walls, one-shot damage that DOES NOT EXIST!
A {advClass}! Senpai they CHEAT. They don't deserve to win. Use EVERYTHING. Bend the rules back.
Cheater! Senpai I am LIVID. The dungeon-keeper community has STANDARDS. Slay them harder than usual.

guild_raid.t: Guild Raid tomorrow! TWICE the wave size, senpai! Hot lobby. We're the SCALE-CHECK encounter!
Senpai the Guild noticed us! That's reputation +1 — but also THREAT +20. Build wide.
Guild Raid! ...Twice the heroes is twice the FRAGS, senpai. Spin the K/D engine UP.

legendary_speedrunner.t: LEGENDARY SPEEDRUNNER, senpai?! This is a RECORD CHASER. They IGNORE everything, they RUSH the throne. INTERCEPT MODE!
Speedrunner incoming! Senpai twice the speed, zero stops. Wall the path, slow them DOWN!
A speedrunner?! Senpai I respect the GRIND but they CANNOT win — RECORD MUST NOT FALL!

dungeon_pestilence.t: Pestilence in the dungeon! Senpai minions wake at HALF HP, sickly. Pre-heal where you can.
Plague day! ...Senpai the BLIGHT proc on melee makes them debuff each other. Spicy DoT.
Pestilence! Sickly minions are a NERF, senpai — adjust the comp.

cartographers_convention.t: Cartographers' Convention, senpai! Every scholar maps DOUBLE today. Infamy will SKYROCKET.
Senpai a WAVE OF MAP-NERDS. They are not fighters, they are AUDITORS. Slay every one.
Convention day! ...Senpai if they map us we're FAMOUS. ...That's BAD for us. Slay them.

blood_moon_eclipse.t: BLOOD MOON, senpai! ...Spooky-mode UNLOCKED. Heroes are TWITCHY, more aggressive, but also more FRAGILE. Iconic.
Eclipse, senpai! The whole dungeon goes RED. ...That's atmospheric. I love atmospheric.
Blood moon! Senpai the AESTHETIC is unmatched. ...Also gameplay impact, but mostly: AESTHETIC.

negotiation_day.t: Negotiation day, senpai! A diplomat at the door, no swords. Pay or REFUSE. ...My vote: refuse.
Diplomat at the door! Senpai weigh the tribute carefully. ...Or just slay them and steal their gold. Either or.
Negotiation! ...Senpai I never know what to do here. Pick the OPTION that feels MOST anime-protag.

rival_dungeon.t: RIVAL DUNGEON SPILL, senpai! Another keeper EMPTIED their monsters into ours. ARENA mode unlocked!
Rival keeper attack! Senpai kill THEIR boss — feast of gold + XP! Cross-server PVP energy!
Rival dungeon, senpai! ...Drama between keepers, very SLICE OF LIFE. Anyway: WIPE them.

twitch_con.t: TWITCH CON?! Senpai it's a CONVENTION OF STREAMERS in our dungeon! META ESCALATION! ...Embrace the chaos!
Twitch Con day! Senpai every hero is a CONTENT CREATOR today. We are STREAMING-BAIT. WE MUST DELIVER.
Twitch Con! ...Senpai we're gonna be on like FORTY streams at once. Pose. Look natural. ...Or terrifying. Either.

dark_deal.t: Dark Deal at the door, senpai! Free pact, half-strength tomorrow. Tempting risk-reward, very 'sign the contract' anime trope.
Dark Deal! Senpai sign the contract or REFUSE. ...The skeleton would sign immediately. I say... ALSO sign. We're the same.
Demon-pact event! Senpai loot the buff, pay the COST. Iconic shounen power-up arc.

cosplay_contest.t: COSPLAY CONTEST?! Senpai a wave of costume heroes! They SNUB minions, only target STORYLINE. Hit them with TRAPS.
Cosplay heroes incoming! Senpai I LOVE this event — they're so well-dressed. ...And so dead-soon.
Cosplay event! Senpai I'd give them a participation award, but the prize is DEATH.

loot_goblin_heist.t: LOOT GOBLINS, senpai?! Heist mode! They SKIP the throne and BOLT for the exit with our gold!
Loot goblins incoming! Senpai every escapee is a STOLEN HOARD. Don't let them OUT!
Goblin heist! Senpai it's like a tutorial mission for a stealth RPG. ...Except the players are the FOES.

tax_season.t: TAX SEASON, senpai! Guild skims a fifth, but kills pay DOUBLE. Make the gold BACK with INTEREST.
Tax day! ...Senpai capitalism follows us EVERYWHERE. Even into the crypt. Tragic.
Tax season! Senpai grind the kills, pay the toll, profit on volume. Standard economy gameplay.

patrons_blessing.t: PATRON'S BLESSING, senpai! DOUBLE boss XP today! Pure upside, no downside! XP GOES BRRR!
Blessing day! Senpai grind ALL THE KILLS. Power-leveling event, don't sleep on this.
Patron's blessing! Senpai this is the RARE DROP of events. Use it WELL.

memory_plague.t: MEMORY PLAGUE, senpai! Heroes forget the maze, wander randomly! Free kills! ...This is cursed and HILARIOUS!
Memory plague day! Senpai the heroes get LOST in OUR dungeon. Iconic.
Plague event! ...Senpai I forget what I was saying. ...Wait. Oh. The plague affects ghosts too maybe?!

gamblers_coin.t: GAMBLER'S COIN, senpai! Flip the coin — DOUBLE or HALF the hoard. Risk-reward in PURE form.
Gambler's day! Senpai I love a coin flip. ...I lose every time but I LOVE one.
Coin flip event! Senpai send it. Send it ALL. ...Or don't. I'm not your financial advisor.

dense_fog.t: DENSE FOG today, senpai! Visibility DROPS. Heroes wander, but so do MINIONS. Chaos-mode unlocked.
Fog event! Senpai the dungeon goes ATMOSPHERIC. Visibility nerf affects both sides — read carefully.
Fog day! ...Senpai the aesthetic is GORGEOUS. Like a horror-game intro.

miasma.t: MIASMA, senpai! Toxic gas, no sides. Whittles HEROES, gnaws at THE THRONE. Don't linger.
Miasma day! Senpai EVERYONE takes DoT today. Hurry the engagements.
Miasma event! ...Senpai I don't breathe, so this doesn't hurt me. ...Should I be smug about that? I'm smug about it.

tremors.t: TREMORS, senpai! Random ROCKFALLS! Dungeon ITSELF is hostile today!
Earthquake day! Senpai the floors are RUMBLING. Read movement carefully.
Tremors event! ...Senpai I literally float, I don't feel a thing. Are you good?

arcane_storm.t: ARCANE STORM, senpai! Magic damage is BUFFED for everyone, hot trade-off energy.
Storm day! Senpai mages on BOTH sides hit HARDER. Balance the comp.
Arcane storm! ...Senpai the dungeon is GLOWING. So pretty. ...So lethal.

bounty_hunters.t: BOUNTY HUNTERS, senpai! Premium adventurers, harder fights, BIGGER drops. Mini-boss wave.
Hunters today! Senpai elite spawn list. Bring the kit. Bring the focus. Bring the GRIND.
Bounty hunters! Senpai these are NAMED MOBS. Iconic encounters. Drop GREAT loot.

zombie_horde.t: ZOMBIE HORDE, senpai! Resurrected heroes RETURN as MINIONS for us! Wait — that's GOOD for us! HYPE!
Horde event! Senpai dead heroes RISE — but for our side! Plot twist of the patch!
Zombie day! ...Senpai I am, frankly, vibe-aligned with the undead. Camera pan to me. SOLIDARITY.

infamy_spike.t: INFAMY SPIKE, senpai! Reputation surges, wave-size doubles tomorrow. Pay the PRICE of fame.
Infamy event! Senpai we're WORLD-FAMOUS now. Heroes coming HARD next day.
Infamy spike! ...Senpai we MADE THE NEWS. Iconic. ...The kingdom is FURIOUS though.

black_market.t: BLACK MARKET appeared, senpai! Forbidden items, RARE pacts. Risky but BUSTED. Iconic shop.
Black market day! Senpai there's GOOD STUFF in there. ...Also bad stuff. Roll the dice.
Market event! ...Senpai I love a SHOP encounter. Inventory management is its own game.

mercenary_contract.t: MERCENARY OFFER, senpai! Hired muscle, doubled strength, three-day timer. Power spike WORTH IT.
Mercenary day! Senpai short-term BUFF unit. Use them HARD, they're temporary.
Merc contract! ...Senpai it's like a limited-time GACHA character. ...I love a limited-time character.

cursed_relic.t: CURSED RELIC, senpai! Claim it for power, banish it for safety. The classic RPG MORAL CHOICE.
Cursed item event! Senpai claim or refuse. ...This is the moment that defines your CHARACTER ARC.
Relic day! ...Senpai cursed items in anime ALWAYS pay off. Just saying. ...They also always ruin lives. Just saying.

the_saboteur.t: A SABOTEUR, senpai! A spy infiltrated the dungeon! Catch them BEFORE they wreck something!
Saboteur incoming! Senpai it's a SECRET HERO. Counter-intel mission. Spy thriller energy.
The Saboteur! ...Senpai I love a stealth mission. ...Even when WE'RE the ones being stealthed. Iconic.

entry_hall.t: Entry Hall placed, senpai! The lobby! First impression matters — heavy invest LANDS.
Entry hall! Senpai the dungeon now has a FOYER. ...Iconic interior design.

starter_corridor.t: Starter corridor! Senpai the bread-and-butter tile. Always have these — they CONNECT the maze.
Corridor placed! Senpai it's the connective tissue of the dungeon. Never skip.

starter_barracks.t: Barracks placed, senpai! Minion housing. Cluster the homies, they BUFF each other.
Barracks! ...Senpai the front-line stays HERE. Solid base of operations.

starter_guard_post.t: Guard Post placed! Senpai active defense, patrols the corridors. The heroes HATE this.
Guard post! Senpai dynamic threat — heroes can't predict the AI movement. Iconic.

crypt.t: Crypt placed, senpai! Rises minions from the DEAD! Necro vibes, very on-brand for me actually.
Crypt! Senpai dead minions COME BACK. I respect the recursion.

trap_factory.t: Trap Factory placed! Senpai TRAP PRODUCTION line UNLOCKED. Iconic.
Trap factory! ...Senpai the dungeon now MAKES things. Industrial revolution down here.

treasury.t: Treasury placed, senpai! THE HOARD. I love a vault. Mostly because I can phase INTO it. Don't tell anyone.
Treasury! Senpai PROTECT this with everything. The loot goblins are HUNTING.

armory.t: Armory placed, senpai! Minions get +stats here. Stack the gear up. This is GEAR-CHECK territory.
Armory! Senpai sharper soldiers, deader heroes. Math.

library_of_whispers.t: LIBRARY OF WHISPERS, senpai! Lore room! Drops INTEL on heroes. ...I LIVE for the lore room.
Library placed! Senpai INFORMATION ADVANTAGE acquired. Smart-keeper move.

watchtower.t: Watchtower placed, senpai! Vision range +1. ...I float HIGH, I don't need the tower, but YOU do. Smart.
Watchtower! ...Senpai SCOUT VISION. Iconic addition to the maze.

wandering_gate.t: WANDERING GATE, senpai! Random teleport, total CHAOS. ...I love it.
Wandering gate placed! Senpai the maze TWISTS. Heroes' pathfinding is gonna FAIL spectacularly.

veil_of_forgetting.t: Veil of Forgetting placed! Senpai heroes LOSE their map memory. They wander RANDOM, perfect.
Veil placed! ...Senpai I LOVE this room. Confusion gameplay, iconic.

catacombs.t: Catacombs placed, senpai! ...Spooky-tier hallway. Iconic AESTHETIC. Also gameplay relevant.
Catacombs! Senpai the dungeon got SPOOKIER. ...I APPROVE of spookier.

mimic_vault.t: MIMIC VAULT, senpai! Fake-loot trap! Heroes go IN excited, come OUT dead. Classic.
Mimic vault! Senpai I LOVE this trope. Fake-treasure encounter is timeless.

hall_of_trials.t: Hall of Trials placed! Senpai a FILTER room — weakest heroes drop BEFORE the boss. Tier system in physical form.
Trials room! Senpai weeds out the trash mobs. Smart design.

wishing_well.t: Wishing Well placed, senpai! Heroes drop COIN for a blessing — and YOU get to PEEK at their prayer!
Wishing well! ...Senpai I want to make a wish too. ...Mine would be 'be alive'. ...Anyway, GAMEPLAY.

false_exit.t: FALSE EXIT, senpai?! Heroes think they ESCAPED — and you spawn behind them! Plot-twist room!
False exit! Senpai BAIT mechanics. So much CRUELTY in one tile.

hall_of_madness.t: HALL OF MADNESS, senpai! Heroes lose their MINDS. Iconic horror room.
Madness hall! ...Senpai the dungeon goes FULL HORROR genre. Lean into it.

throne_room.t: THRONE ROOM placed, senpai! YOUR home. The FINAL EPISODE stage. Decorate it CINEMATIC.
Throne room! Senpai this is where the boss fight HAPPENS. Make it EPIC.

sanctum.t: Sanctum placed, senpai! The inner inner sanctum. Heroes shouldn't EVER reach this. ...I love a hidden room.
Sanctum! ...Senpai this is your SAFE SPACE. The deepest tile. Iconic.

skeleton.t: Skeleton placed! ...Senpai wave to Rattle for me. Distant cousin. ...Like, REALLY distant.
Skeleton minion! Senpai the OG dungeon mook. Reliable, classic, never goes out of style.

orc.t: Orc placed! Senpai BIG GUY archetype. Tanky, hits hard, very LOUD.
Orc! Senpai standard front-line. Stack 'em deep.

goblin.t: Goblin placed! Senpai NUMBERS GAME. Cheap, fragile, plentiful. SPAM strategy.
Goblin! ...Senpai they're so SMALL. I love a tiny enemy.

imp.t: Imp placed! Senpai fast little RANGED guys. Skirmisher class.
Imp! Senpai they HARASS the front. Annoying for heroes, ICONIC for us.

ghost.t: GHOST minion placed!! ...Senpai. SENPAI. They're like ME. Can I HUG them? ...Yes? Hugging them. 👻
Ghost minion! Senpai they PASS through walls. ...I have so many friends now. Hi friends.

slime.t: Slime placed! Senpai DPS pudding. Slow, sticky, deals DoT to anything that touches them.
Slime! ...Senpai they JIGGLE. So cute. So gross. Iconic both ways.

elder_slime.t: Elder Slime placed, senpai! BIGGER pudding, BIGGER stats. ...Just MORE slime, basically.
Elder slime! Senpai the VETERAN puddings. ...Senpai how do slimes age. Don't answer.

golem.t: Golem placed, senpai! Pure TANK. Slow, immovable, eats damage for the squad.
Golem minion! Senpai the IMMOVABLE OBJECT. Stack behind them.

beholder.t: Beholder minion placed! Senpai EYE TURRET. Long-range, CC stacker. Op.
Beholder! ...Senpai all those eyes again, ICONIC kit.

lich.t: Lich minion placed! ...Senpai he's like a mini-version of the boss-lich. Recursive necromancy. Iconic.
Lich minion! Senpai high-tier undead caster. Phylactery vibes.

lizardman.t: Lizardman placed! Senpai STEALTH attacker. They camouflage — heroes don't see the hit coming.
Lizardman! Senpai sneaky little reptile. I love the ambush playstyle.

gnoll.t: Gnoll placed, senpai! Pack hunter — stack with friends, they BUFF each other.
Gnoll! Senpai they HOWL. ...I love an angry minion sound effect.

demon.t: Demon minion placed! Senpai HELLFIRE on tap. Big damage, big presence.
Demon! ...Senpai I love a flashy minion. Cinematic class.

ent.t: Ent placed, senpai! TREE MINION. Slow, tanky, ROOTS heroes in place. Crowd-control king.
Ent! ...Senpai trees can be SCARY. Iconic plant kit.

plant.t: Plant placed! Senpai SPORE turret. Range, AoE, DoT — beautiful turret minion.
Plant minion! ...Senpai gardening simulator is SUDDENLY a strategy game.

mushroom.t: MUSHROOM minion, senpai! Spore-cloud kit. ...Slightly gross, deeply effective.
Mushroom! Senpai it's like a tiny BIOLOGY EXPERIMENT in the dungeon.

rat.t: Rat placed, senpai! SWARM tactics. Numbers over quality. CHEAP and EFFECTIVE.
Rat! ...Senpai they're tiny and they BITE. Iconic mook.

zombie.t: ZOMBIE placed!! ...Senpai another undead friend! HI FRIEND. ...Solidarity in the corpse-life.
Zombie minion! Senpai slow but RELENTLESS. Marathon damage.

vampire_minion.t: Vampire minion placed, senpai! LIFE-STEAL on hit, self-sustaining DPS. ...Goth aesthetic, very my era.
Vampire minion! Senpai sustain-DPS class. Heals while it kills. Beautiful efficiency.

shooting_arrows.t: Arrows trap placed! Senpai PIERCE damage, ranged. Heroes HATE being shot at.
Arrows! ...Senpai BOW ENERGY without an archer. Iconic value.

bomb.t: BOMB placed, senpai! BIG AoE, single use, big number. CINEMATIC kill potential.
Bomb trap! Senpai I love a SCRIPTED explosion. Hype mechanic.

cannon.t: CANNON placed, senpai! BIG KNOCKBACK! Heroes get YEETED across the room. Iconic.
Cannon! ...Senpai the launch animation is SO satisfying. Slapstick gameplay.

spike_pillar.t: Spike Pillar placed, senpai! Vertical hazard, hits stacked targets. AoE column.
Spike pillar! Senpai classic dungeon trap, never out of style.

dragon_trap.t: DRAGON TRAP placed, senpai?! BIG SCARY mechanism! Massive AoE, BIG kill potential!
Dragon trap! ...Senpai why is it called dragon trap when IT'S the trap, not the dragon? Anyway. ICONIC.

spike_pit.t: Spike Pit placed, senpai! Floor hazard, instant on step. Classic trap-genre staple.
Spike pit! Senpai SIMPLE design, ALWAYS works. The skeleton would approve.

rotating_blades.t: ROTATING BLADES, senpai! Continuous AoE damage zone! Iconic kit, very dungeon-classic.
Blades! ...Senpai it's HYPNOTIC to watch. Beautiful AND deadly.

saw_blade.t: SAW BLADE placed, senpai! HIGH damage to the BOLD. Heroes who charge through get FRAGGED.
Saw blade! ...Senpai the most aggressive trap. I love how UNFORGIVING it is.

door_lock.t: Door Lock placed, senpai! Slows heroes, RAGES rogues — they ABSOLUTELY hate being locked out.
Door lock! Senpai it's a small delay but heroes WILL fume. Iconic micro-trap.

treasure_chest.t: Treasure Chest placed, senpai! BAIT. Heroes can't RESIST a chest. ...Honestly neither can I.
Chest! ...Senpai I've looked in dungeon chests before. SOMETIMES they bite. ...Lessons.

soul_bound_beacon.t: Soul-Bound Beacon placed, senpai! Fallen heroes COME BACK as minions! ...Senpai necro-vibes UNLOCKED.
Soul beacon! ...Senpai I respect a recruit-from-the-dead mechanic. Iconic.

phylactery_heart.t: Phylactery Heart placed, senpai! SPARE LIFE acquired. ...Hide it WELL — heroes hunt these.
Phylactery! Senpai this is a checkpoint, a save state, a SECOND CHANCE. Iconic kit-piece.
